scores.correctness_notes: Core structure is correct (temp_model fixture, deploy, wait). However, agent incorrectly states jubilant.all_active checks active/idle — it only checks active status; all_agents_idle is separate. The successes=3 default behaviour is not mentioned.
scores.hallucination_notes: status.apps["my-charm"].is_active attribute not confirmed to exist in jubilant API; passing multiple app names to jubilant.all_active(status, "my-charm", "postgresql") may not be valid (gold standard shows single app name filter); juju.deploy config= parameter and juju.integrate() not confirmed but plausible.
